hero.headline: I Build Fast, Reliable Web Applications & MVPs
hero.subheadline: Full-Stack Developer. First-time clients get a free technical audit and a discount on their first MVP project.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a Full-Stack developer who specializes in building MVPs and solving complex technical challenges. I focus on clean architecture, performance, and delivering real business value.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: Services tailored for startups and growing businesses

mvp.title: MVP Development
mvp.description: Fast time-to-market. Transform your idea into a production-ready application quickly and efficiently.

backend.title: Custom Backend APIs
backend.description: Scalable and secure architecture using Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Responsive, fast, and modern user interfaces built with React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.

process.title: My Process
process.subtitle: How we go from idea to reality

discovery.title: 1. Discovery
discovery.description: Understanding the problem, defining requirements, and planning the technical architecture.

development.title: 2. Development
development.description: Writing clean, scalable code with regular updates and transparent communication.

delivery.title: 3. Delivery & Support
delivery.description: Deployment, documentation, handover, and ongoing support to ensure everything runs smoothly.

background.title: Engineering Background
background.subtitle: Beyond standard web development, I thrive on solving low-level challenges and architecting scalable systems.

linux.title: Infrastructure & Linux Admin
linux.description: Extensive experience in Linux server administration, configuring custom hosting environments, and managing resilient infrastructure for game servers and web apps.

bots.title: High-Load Community Bots
bots.description: Developed and deployed custom Discord bots serving large-scale communities of up to 40,000 members. Handled API integrations, automated moderation, and complex backend logic.

hardware.title: Hardware Hacking & Home Servers
hardware.description: Successfully engineered a low-power home server by flashing custom firmware onto a mobile device, gaining root access, and overclocking it to handle continuous web hosting and file synchronization.

projects.subtitle: Real problems. Real solutions. Real results.
